message:
docs: add hero illustration for README

Add ms_illustration.png (1536x1024, 2.2MB) as the hero image for the
project README.

The illustration visually represents the meta-skill concept: mining
AI assistant sessions into reusable skills. Used at the top of
README.md to create visual appeal and convey the project's purpose
at a glance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
